label: 拉伸
description: 将 profile 沿 Z 轴拉伸为实体 shape。何时用：从一个 2D 截面生成棱柱/板/异形柱体（先用 Profile 家族画截面，再拉伸；不要用 g_box 近似非矩形截面）。
description-en: Extrude a profile along Z into a solid shape. Use when: turning a 2D section into a prism/plate/non-box column — build the section with a Profile op first, then extrude; do not approximate a non-rectangular section with g_box.

inputs.name: geometry
inputs.label: 几何
inputs.description: 上游 Geometry（必须含 profile_id 所指 profile）
inputs.description-en: Upstream Geometry; must contain the profile referenced by profile_id.

inputs.name: profile_id
inputs.label: Profile id
inputs.description: 要拉伸的 profile id；从上游 Profile 节点（g_profile_*）的 id 输出端口连入
inputs.description-en: Id of the profile to extrude. Feed from an upstream Profile node's (`g_profile_*`) `id` output.

inputs.name: height
inputs.label: 高度
inputs.description: 沿 Z 的拉伸高度（米）

inputs.name: center
inputs.label: 居中
inputs.description: true = 关于 Z=0 居中，否则从 0 向上拉伸
inputs.description-en: true = center about Z=0, else extrude upward from 0.

inputs.name: id
inputs.label: id
inputs.description: 本结果的自定义 id；空 = 自动 ext{n}

outputs.name: geometry
outputs.label: 几何
outputs.description: 追加拉伸实体后的 Geometry
outputs.description-en: Geometry after appending the extruded solid.

outputs.name: id
outputs.label: id
outputs.description: 本行 shape 的 id（供下游 g_part / CSG 引用）；引用失败时为空串
outputs.description-en: Id of the new shape (for downstream g_part / CSG). Empty string when the ref failed.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: 错误
outputs.description: profile_id 缺失或找不到时的原因；非空表示未追加任何几何，批次仍可能报 ok，务必读取
outputs.description-en: Reason when profile_id is missing or not found. Non-empty means nothing was appended even though the batch may report ok — always read it.
